caption: Three people are seated on a stage for a panel discussion. On the left, a man with dark curly hair and a beard wears a white button-down shirt. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and black trousers. On the right, a man with short dark hair wears a light blue shirt and a grey suit. They are seated in light-colored wooden chairs with white cushions. In front of the man on the left is a large, intricate structure made of white LEGO bricks. The background is dark with purple lighting accents. A partially visible logo with red and yellow lettering is seen behind the speakers' legs. Throughout the sequence, the woman gestures with her hands while speaking and looking toward the man on the right, who listens attentively. The man on the left remains relatively still, looking toward the other two.
